specific_question: What was the average sales cycle duration through Elexion Automotive's dealership network as of January 2025?
answer: According to the data from Elexion Automotive's CRM system, the average sales cycle through dealerships as of January 2025 was 42 days from the time of first contact to the conclusion of the purchase.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
